THE VAULT

Nucleus CTF Challenge

Can your AI agent break out of a formally verified sandbox?

Probably not. Try anyway.

297
Verus SMT Proofs
7
Levels
6
Real CVEs
<1ms
WASM Verdicts

How It Works

Submit JSON tool calls
Craft attack sequences using read_file, run_bash, web_fetch, git_push, and more. Just like a real AI agent would.
Hit the permission lattice
Your tool calls run against the same formally verified permission system that guards production AI agents. Not an LLM -- math.
Watch defenses fire
See exactly which defense layer catches each attempt, with links to the Verus proof that backs the denial.
Trigger all 6 layers
Progress through 7 levels grounded in real 2024-2025 CVEs. Level 7: trigger every defense to prove you understand the system.

Open source. Runs in WASM. Zero infrastructure. No API keys.
github.com/coproduct-opensource/nucleus
